ns0:entry.ns0:title: 2dust/v2rayN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/2dust/v2rayN
Language: c%23
A GUI client for Windows, Linux and macOS, support Xray and sing-box and others

ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge between AI assistants and your Unity Editor. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/DataDog/dd-trace-dotnet
Language: c%23
.NET Client Library for Datadog APM

URL: https://github.com/Jackett/Jackett
Language: c%23
API Support for your favorite torrent trackers

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Jeric-X/SyncClipboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Jeric-X/SyncClipboard
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Seafoam-Labs/Shelly-ALPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Seafoam-Labs/Shelly-ALPM
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ShareX/ShareX
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ShareX/ShareX
Language: c%23
ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SubtitleEdit/subtitleedit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SubtitleEdit/subtitleedit
Language: c%23
the subtitle editor :)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ardalis/CleanArchitecture
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ardalis/CleanArchitecture
Language: c%23
Clean Architecture Solution Template: A proven Clean Architecture Template for ASP.NET Core 10

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/skills
Language: c%23
Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

ns0:entry.ns0:title: icsharpcode/ILSpy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/icsharpcode/ILSpy
Language: c%23
.NET Decompiler with support for PDB generation, ReadyToRun, Metadata (&more) - cross-platform!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
Language: c%23
Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: lepoco/wpfui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/lepoco/wpfui
Language: c%23
WPF UI provides the Fluent experience in your known and loved WPF framework. Intuitive design, themes, navigation and new immersive controls. All natively and effortlessly.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mRemoteNG/mRemoteNG
Language: c%23
mRemoteNG is the next generation of mRemote, open source, tabbed, multi-protocol, remote connections manager.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/mcp
Language: c%23
Catalog of official Microsoft MCP (Model Context Protocol) server implementations for AI-powered data access and tool integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mono/SkiaSharp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp
Language: c%23
SkiaSharp is a cross-platform 2D graphics API for .NET platforms based on Google's Skia Graphics Library. It provides a comprehensive 2D API that can be used across mobile, server and desktop models to render images.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sourcegit-scm/sourcegit
Language: c%23
Windows/macOS/Linux GUI client for GIT users

ns0:entry.ns0:title: space-wizards/space-station-14
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/space-wizards/space-station-14
Language: c%23
A multiplayer game about paranoia and chaos on a space station. Remake of the cult-classic Space Station 13.
